author: Achmage
description: Import HWP, HWPX, PDF, DOCX and XLSX files into your notes as Markdown, and convert notes back to HWP, DOCX and HTML through templates. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Achmage
manifest.description: Export styled, image-inclusive HWPX with reusable templates and bundled Kordoc. No Python setup required.
manifest.name: HanMark

name: HanMark

releases.author: laguna821
releases.description:
# HanMark 2.4.2 — No-setup HWPX / 무설치 HWPX

## English

HanMark 2.4.2 is the first public 2.x release and upgrades directly from Community version 1.2.0.

### Highlights

- Bundles exactly pinned Kordoc 4.2.5 for HWPX generation, validation, import, source patching, and fast SVG preview.
- Creates styled HWPX with remote, data-URI, and Vault images embedded in the document package.
- Adds reusable built-in and unlimited user templates combining body/Heading 1–6 typography, paragraph/page rules, and optional table styles.
- Makes generated font names, indentation, spacing, and named styles editable from Hancom Office's toolbar and F6 dialog.
- Adds resizable, full-screen-capable export and template-management dialogs.
- Retires Python and pypandoc-hwpx installation from every HWPX workflow.
- Keeps Pandoc only as an optional local dependency for DOCX export. HWPX and HTML need no Pandoc path.
- Preserves the original HWP/HWPX when creating a source-patched copy.
- Passes 44 automated conversion tests, the official Obsidian ESLint rules, HWPX package validation, and startup bundle guards.

### Upgrade notes

- Existing command IDs and `hwp-source-*` frontmatter remain compatible.
- Former one-slot HWPX document/table settings migrate into the template library on first load.
- Obsidian 1.5.7 or later is required.
- HanMark remains desktop-only. Mobile is not supported.

### Privacy

There is no telemetry or account requirement. Network access occurs only for HTTP(S) images explicitly present in a note being previewed or exported. DOCX can optionally run a user-configured local Pandoc executable.

## 한국어

HanMark 2.4.2는 첫 공개 2.x 버전이며 Community 버전 1.2.0에서 바로 업데이트할 수 있습니다.

### 주요 변화

- 정확히 고정된 Kordoc 4.2.5를 HWPX 생성·검증·가져오기·원본 수정·빠른 SVG 미리보기 엔진으로 내장했습니다.
- 원격·data URI·Vault 이미지를 문서 패키지 안에 실제로 포함한 스타일 HWPX를 생성합니다.
- 바탕글·제목 1~6 글꼴, 문단·페이지 규칙과 선택적 표 스타일을 묶는 내장 및 무제한 사용자 템플릿을 추가했습니다.
- 생성된 글꼴명, 들여쓰기, 간격과 이름 스타일을 한컴오피스 상단 도구 모음과 F6에서 확인하고 편집할 수 있습니다.
- 내보내기와 템플릿 관리 창을 확대·크기 조절 가능한 구조로 바꿨습니다.
- 모든 HWPX 절차에서 Python과 pypandoc-hwpx 설치를 종료했습니다.
- Pandoc은 DOCX 내보내기에만 선택적으로 남습니다. HWPX와 HTML에는 Pandoc 경로가 필요 없습니다.
- 원본 형식 수정본을 만들 때 기존 HWP/HWPX를 덮어쓰지 않습니다.
- 자동 변환 테스트 44개, 공식 Obsidian ESLint, HWPX 패키지 검증과 시작 번들 검사를 통과합니다.

### 업데이트 안내

- 기존 명령 ID와 `hwp-source-*` 프런트매터는 호환됩니다.
- 이전의 한 칸짜리 HWPX 문서·표 설정은 첫 실행 때 템플릿 라이브러리로 이전됩니다.
- Obsidian 1.5.7 이상이 필요합니다.
- 데스크톱 전용이며 모바일은 지원하지 않습니다.

### 개인정보

텔레메트리와 계정 요구가 없습니다. 네트워크는 사용자가 미리보거나 내보내는 노트에 명시된 HTTP(S) 이미지를 가져올 때만 사용합니다. DOCX는 사용자가 지정한 로컬 Pandoc을 선택적으로 실행할 수 있습니다.
releases.name: HanMark 2.4.2 — No-setup HWPX / 무설치 HWPX

releases.author: laguna821
releases.description:
## HanMark 1.2.0

### Fixed

- **HWPX template selection now takes effect during the session.** Previously, choosing a custom HWPX template was shown as selected but did not actually apply to the live preview or export — the pipeline kept falling back to the built-in blank template until Obsidian was restarted. The selected template is now used immediately for both preview and export.
- **Live preview and export honor the selected template's headings.** Because the correct template is now resolved, `#`/`##`/`###`/`####`/`#####` headings render with the styles defined in the chosen template.
- **Template styles re-extract when the path is edited in Settings.** Changing the template path directly in the settings tab now refreshes the preview styles automatically (debounced), not only via the "select template" command.
- **Paper preview colors no longer follow the Obsidian theme.** Bold text and headings in the split-screen preview kept following the theme's accent/bold color in light and dark mode; they now stay the document ink color like paper, while template-defined heading colors are preserved.

### Notes

- Desktop only. Live preview and export require a local Python + pandoc environment (guided on first use).

releases.author: laguna821
releases.description:
## HanMark 1.1.0 — multi-file bulk import 📦

You can now **import many documents at once**.

### What's new
- **Multi-select in the import dialog** (shift / ctrl-click) — pick 5, 50, or 100 files at once.
- Selected files convert **in parallel** with a live progress notice (`변환 중 N/M…`).
- Each file becomes its own Markdown note; one failure never stops the rest.
- A summary appears when done (`✅ X · ⚠️ Y · ❌ Z`), with a detailed report only when there are failures or warnings.
- Single-file import is unchanged — it still opens the new note right away.

Turn a whole folder of HWP / HWPX / PDF / DOCX / XLSX into a vault of Markdown notes in one go.

Desktop only — Windows, macOS, Linux.

**Manual install:** download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` below into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/hanmark/`.
releases.name: HanMark 1.1.0

releases.author: laguna821
releases.description:
## HanMark 1.0.2

A two-way bridge between Korean HWP documents and Obsidian.

### 📥 Import (built-in, offline)
Convert HWP, HWPX, PDF, DOCX, XLSX/XLS to Markdown in one click — no Python or setup needed.

### 👁 Live preview & 📤 export (Python + pandoc)
Preview HWP/DOCX inside Obsidian, and export notes back to HWP, DOCX, or HTML via templates.

Desktop only — Windows, macOS, Linux.

_Review fixes: use Obsidian's `setCssStyles()` API instead of direct element styles; removed a dead IE-era `setImmediate` `<script>` fallback from bundled deps (behavior unchanged)._

**Manual install:** download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` below into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/hanmark/`.
releases.name: HanMark 1.0.2

releases.author: laguna821
releases.description:
## HanMark 1.0.1

A two-way bridge between Korean HWP documents and Obsidian.

### 📥 Import (built-in, offline)
Convert HWP, HWPX, PDF, DOCX, XLSX/XLS to Markdown in one click — no Python or setup needed.

### 👁 Live preview & 📤 export (Python + pandoc)
Preview HWP/DOCX inside Obsidian, and export notes back to HWP, DOCX, or HTML via templates.

Desktop only — Windows, macOS, Linux.

_Build fix vs 1.0.0: removed a dead, IE-era `setImmediate` fallback (inlined by bundled dependencies) that statically resembled dynamic `<script>` injection. It never executed under Electron, so behavior is unchanged._

**Manual install:** download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` below into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/hanmark/`.
releases.name: HanMark 1.0.1

releases.author: laguna821
releases.description:
## HanMark 1.0.0

A two-way bridge between Korean HWP documents and Obsidian.

### 📥 Import (built-in, offline)
Convert HWP, HWPX, PDF, DOCX, XLSX/XLS to Markdown in one click — no Python or setup needed. The original source is recorded in the note's frontmatter.

### 👁 Live preview & 📤 export (Python + pandoc)
Preview HWP/DOCX inside Obsidian, and export notes back to HWP, DOCX, or HTML via templates. The plugin guides the one-time toolchain setup on first use.

Desktop only — Windows, macOS, Linux.

**Manual install:** download `main.js`, `manifest.json` and `styles.css` below into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/hanmark/`.
releases.name: HanMark 1.0.0
